title: Sorted Insert Position
hints: Use binary search to find the target value or the insertion position.
If the target is found, return its index immediately.
If the target is not found, the left pointer (lo) will point to the correct insertion position.
When A[mid] < B, move left pointer to mid+1.
When A[mid] >= B, move right pointer to mid-1.
After the loop ends, return the left pointer as it indicates where the target should be inserted.
